name: Master Tao
lore: An old man in his late 50s and a master of Toll. He is the examiner Duke and Lyra face in phase 1 of the ledger exam. He is an expert in using flame attacks and is feared among other ledgers for his immense power. However, he also has a surprisingly charming side when he is not serious or in battle.

skills.description: Strikes the enemy with a palm wreathed in flames, dealing ATK damage and applying Ignite.
Consumes all Ignite stacks from the enemy, increasing his attack by 20% for each stack consumed, and dealing devastating ATK damage to a single enemy.

ultimate.description: Unleashes a massive wave of fire, applying 3 Ignite stacks to all enemies and dealing ATK damage to all enemies.

passive.name: Healing Flames
passive.description: For every 3 Ignite stacks consumed, restores Master Tao's HP by 30% (max of 3 times).
